title: Product Manager Fellowship
instructors: Arindam Mukherjeeteaches the curriculum in the first 3 weeks. He is the co-founder of NextLeap and was previously the head of consumer product and growth at Flipkart for almost 7 years. He holds a Harvard Business School MBA and is an alum of IIT Kharagpur, with close to 2 decades of experience in the technology industry.
Karthi Subbaramanleads the design team at ServiceNow and has previously worked at Microsoft and Salesforce as part of the design leadership team. She teaches the user research module.
Prashanth Bhaskaranis a product lead at Uber and was previously leading the data platform product at CRED. He teaches the Interview Prep module.
Eshan Tiwariis a Lead Data Scientist at Meta and has previously worked at Google in data science roles. He teaches modules on AI.
Kartik Singhis a senior product designer at Microsoft and teaches the Wireframing & UX Foundations modules.
Devanshis a Product Lead at Jiostar and was previously a Product Manager at Flipkart. He teaches the Metrics module and the case hour sessions.

Saksham Arorais a senior software engineer at Intuit and was previously a software engineer at Microsoft. He teaches the technology foundations module and how to build products with AI tools like Cursor.
Shailesh Sharmais a Senior Product Manager at Myntra and teaches the Interview Prep modules
